sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10374" key="a)nti/pneusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντί-πνευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10374.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">opposite current of air,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:20:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.20.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
